__init__.py
attempt_ledger.py
  def _deque_maxlen() -> int
  def ledger_enabled() -> bool
  def clear_ledger() -> None
  def _is_failure_result(result: str) -> bool
  def _consecutive_failure_streak(canonical: str) -> int
  def _append_record(canonical: str, ok: bool) -> None
  def _maybe_persist(canonical: str, ok: bool, result: str) -> None
  def finalize_tool_result(canonical: str, result: str) -> str
constants.py
context_builder.py
  def build_llm_message_list(
    system_prompt: str,
    history_turns: List[Dict[str, Any]],
    *,
    workspace_root: Optional[str] = None,
    include_workspace_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_agent_state_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_open_files_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_terminal_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_mode_router_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_workflow_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
llm_client.py
  class LLMClient
    def __init__(self, api_url: str, api_key: str, model: str = DEFAULT_MODEL) -> None
    def chat(
        self,
        messages: List[Dict[str, Any]],
        *,
        temperature: float,
        max_tokens: int,
        tools: Optional[List[Any]] = None,
        timeout: float = REQUEST_TIMEOUT,
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]
    def chat_text(
        self,
        messages: List[Dict[str, Any]],
        *,
        temperature: float,
        max_tokens: int,
        timeout: float = 60.0,
    ) -> str
open_files_context.py
  def parse_open_files_payload(data: Any) -> tuple[List[str], Optional[str]]
  def _open_files_hint_enabled() -> bool
  def _read_open_files_raw(workspace_root: str) -> tuple[List[str], Optional[str]]
  def _shorten_path(p: str, root: str) -> str
  def open_files_context_block(workspace_root: Optional[str]) -> str
open_files_http_cache.py
  def clear_http_open_files() -> None
  def set_http_open_files(workspace_root: str, payload: Any) -> None
  def get_http_open_files(workspace_root: str) -> Optional[Tuple[List[str], Optional[str]]]
prompt_runtime.py
  class PromptRuntimeLayer
  class PromptRuntimeSnapshot
    def layer_names(self) -> List[str]
  def _env_flag(name: str, default: str = "1") -> bool
  def _workspace_hint_enabled() -> bool
  def _agent_state_hint_enabled() -> bool
  def _terminal_hint_enabled() -> bool
  def _open_files_hint_enabled() -> bool
  def _repo_map_hint_enabled() -> bool
  def _mode_router_hint_enabled() -> bool
  def _workflow_hint_enabled() -> bool
  def resolve_runtime_flags(
    *,
    include_workspace_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_agent_state_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_open_files_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_terminal_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_mode_router_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_workflow_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_repo_map_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
) -> Dict[str, bool]
  def _build_workspace_block(workspace_root: Optional[str]) -> str
  def _approx_tokens(text: str) -> int
  def _truncate_user_memory(text: str) -> str
  def _lean_prompt(base_system_prompt: str) -> str
  def _verbose_prompt(base_system_prompt: str) -> str
  def compile_prompt_runtime(
    base_system_prompt: str,
    *,
    user_memory_text: str = "",
    model_tier: int = 2,
    workspace_root: Optional[str] = None,
    include_workspace_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_agent_state_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_open_files_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_terminal_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_mode_router_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_workflow_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_repo_map_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
) -> PromptRuntimeSnapshot
  def build_runtime_messages(
    base_system_prompt: str,
    history_turns: List[Dict[str, Any]],
    *,
    user_memory_text: str = "",
    model_tier: int = 2,
    workspace_root: Optional[str] = None,
    include_workspace_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_agent_state_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_open_files_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_terminal_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_mode_router_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_workflow_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
    include_repo_map_hint: Optional[bool] = None,
) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
terminal_context.py
  def _terminal_hint_enabled() -> bool
  def terminal_context_block(workspace_root: Optional[str]) -> str
thought_parser.py
  class ThoughtProcessParser
workflow_context.py
  def workflow_guidelines_enabled() -> bool
  def workflow_guidelines_block(workspace_root: Optional[str]) -> str
